description: The Information Security team requires all high-severity network alerts to be ingested into the central SIEM. A specification document has been placed on the desktop at ~/Desktop/siem_forwarding_spec.txt. Review the specification and configure a new Syslog Notification Profile in OpManager to forward Critical and Trouble alarms to the SOC's Syslog server using the exact parameters and custom message payload defined. Application: http://localhost:8060 (admin/Admin@123).
